templateDetails.textbox_1:
Dear [Name of the Recipient],

Kindly confirm the below balances to us pertaining to the account balances of [Name of the Client] as are held with you as on [Period-end Date]:

table_2.heading: Overdrawn Current Accounts
table_2.subheading: Overdraft Accounts and Cash Credit Accounts
table_2.footnote: *Give brief description of the documents executed with you for the above facilities and in case of securities e.g. shares, bonds or Title Deeds, please list them in full.

table_3.heading: Loan Accounts
table_3.footnote: *Give brief description of the documents executed with you for the above facilities and in case of securities e.g. shares, bonds or Title Deeds, please list them in full.

table_4.heading: Fixed, Call and Short Deposit Accounts
columns: Particulars for any charges for liens

table_5.heading: Investments and other Documents of title held in Safe Custody
columns: Value or number of shares held
table_5.footnote: *In case of investments held in D-Mat form, please enclose a statement of holding along with this annexure.

table_6.heading: Margin against Letters of Credit, Guarantees issued, etc.

table_8.heading: Bills for Collection
table_8.footnote: (Including Trust Receipt facilities, import loans or export bills negotiated etc. with the list of documents obtained for the same)

table_9.heading: Letters of Credit
columns: Letters of credit open and outstanding list of documents for the same in favour of

table_10a.heading: Guarantees (a)
columns: Guarantees given on behalf of clients

table_10b.heading: Guarantees (b)
columns: Letter of support / comfort / awareness details
Whether in the nature of guarantee by the Company

textbox_interest.heading: Interest Accrued
textbox_interest.description: Please state the amount of interest accrued but not due and not debited by you and interest overdue, if any, stating separately for each account.

table_12.heading: Derivative Contracts
table_12.subheading: List of all outstanding derivative contracts such as forward exchange contracts, currency and interest rate options, swaps, etc. as on closing date.

question_1.statement: Whether the Entity has been declared a “wilful defaulter” or any show cause notice issued to the company under the ‘Master Circular on Wilful Defaulters’ dated July 1, 2014, as amended, issued by the Reserve Bank of India?

confirmingpartystatement.statement: We certify that the above particulars (read alongwith the attachments if any) are full and correct and do not exclude any other financial relationship of the entity with us.

templateDetails.textbox_1:
Dear [Name of the Recipient],

Kindly furnish a list that describes and evaluates pending or threatened litigations, claims, and assessments with respect to which you have been engaged and to which you have devoted substantive attention on behalf of [Name of Client Company] in the form of legal consultation or representation.
templateDetails.textbox_2: Kindly also furnish a list of unasserted claims or assessments (considered by management to be probable of assertion and which, if asserted, would have at least a reasonable possibility of an unfavourable outcome).
templateDetails.textbox_3:
The list of matters should include details of:
(1) Description of nature
(2) Progress
(3) Entity response
(4) Likelihood and estimate of loss
templateDetails.textbox_4: Please identify the nature of, and reasons for, any limitation on your response.

confirmingpartystatement.statement: We certify that the above particulars (read alongwith the attachments if any) are full and correct and do not exclude any other legal relationship of the entity with us.

rows.Nature of Relationship as at [Period end: Company in which KMP or his/her relative has significant influence
Any change in relationship during the year or subsequent to year-end

table_2.heading: Details of transactions with [Client Organization Name] during the year ended [Period End Date]

rows.Particulars: Unutilized loan amount and temporary deployment

confirmingpartystatement.statement:
We certify that the above particulars (read alongwith the attachments if any) are full and correct and have been executed at arm's length*.

*The expression arm's length means a transaction between two related parties that is conducted as if they were unrelated, so that there is no conflict of interest.
